name: @op1/fast-mode
description: Fast mode plugin for OpenCode that enables priority service tier for approved provider/model/agent requests

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/fast-mode.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external zod && bun build src/tui/index.ts --outfile dist/tui.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external zod && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap false --outDir dist
